project.name: Yachtielink
project.one_line: A crew-owned professional identity network where yacht-backed work history creates the foundation for trusted references.
project.current_phase: Phase 1A - Portable Profile + Yacht Graph + Endorsements
project.north_star: Build crew-owned profile infrastructure that turns yacht-backed work history into a living colleague graph and endorsement loop, then fund it with paid presentation upgrades.

canonical_rules.monetisation: You can't pay to be more trusted. You can only pay to present yourself better.
interpretation: Credibility is never gated by payment
Payment may improve presentation quality and workflow convenience
Any later discovery monetisation must stay decoupled from trust outcomes

identity_layer.description: Free, permanent identity and graph infrastructure

presentation_layer.description: Paid presentation polish and workflow convenience
presentation_layer.constraints: May improve presentation quality, workflow convenience, and later discovery efficiency. Never alters trust outcomes or moderation power.

phase_invariants: The yacht graph is the current wedge
Graph edges in the current build are created by shared yacht employment
Payment never grants moderation power or verified status
Growth can be paused if graph quality degrades

relationship_model.colleague: Graph edge created by overlapping yacht employment
relationship_model.graph_invariant: Current build graph edges = colleagues only
relationship_model.future_extension: IRL connections may be added later without changing the reality-bound rule

crew_pro.target: Active crew building profile polish and reference momentum
